label: Transparent king vulture face motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous King Vulture transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated king vulture face motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A vivid king vulture face as a premium operations-system motif: bright orange and yellow caruncled crown and beak details, deep purple facial skin accents, sharp black mask markings, clean white neck plumage, precise dark eye, accurate tropical-forest bird anatomy, crisp silhouette edges, refined high-detail natural texture, sophisticated product-design identity.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; frontal three-quarter face and upper neck only, no crop through the beak or crown, no environment, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving saturated orange, yellow, purple, black, and white face markings with strong readable form.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no tropical forest background, no other birds, no feathers floating separately, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous King Vulture" / "King Vulture" using the motif of a vivid king vulture face from a tropical forest.
Visual identity: vivid operations system, precise product UI, king vulture facial colors, saturated crown orange, golden throat yellow, deep facial purple, black mask markings, white plumage surfaces, tropical forest shadow neutrals, premium command-center polish, high-contrast operational clarity.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, radio controls, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, alert-strip accents inspired by vulture crown folds, sharp black mask dividers, white-plumage cards, orange primary actions, yellow priority states, purple focus states, tropical forest neutral borders, dense dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Overview, Forest Ops, Health, Status, Queue, Table, Revenue, Conversion, Active, Pending, Alert, Search.
Palette names visible: Crown Orange #f56b16, Signal Yellow #f5b21c, Face Purple #7d3f78, Mask Black #151313, Plumage White #fbf7ef, Canopy Green #3e5f3d, Bone Sand #d8c58e, Alert Coral #e84f32, Deep Canopy #1f241d, Mist Gray #d8d7cf.
Composition: full design-system board, crisp readable large labels, organized columns and bands, no tiny token tables, no overlap, no mock browser chrome, no marketing hero.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic blue or purple gradient kit, no neon green subject colors, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
